prevented_failure_purpose: Prevent reuse of a PhysicsGuard model asset unless its profile, testbench, compatibility evidence, gaps, validation receipt, and bounded reuse scope are current for the requested project.

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Current model asset and profile inventory
Current compatibility, validation, and known-limit receipts

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against library inventory is incomplete
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: selected assets, profiles, or testbenches are absent from the current inventory
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against compatibility is not proven
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the selected asset and target testbench/model interfaces are incompatible or unevaluated
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against validation or gap evidence is stale
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the validation receipt is stale, missing, or unresolved gaps are hidden
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against reuse scope is overreached
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the requested reuse exceeds the validated compatibility boundary
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

claim_boundary: This guard-model proof blocks only candidate admission when declared target-native obligation evidence is missing or native-failed. It does not independently detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, workflow, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
